Class CrosstabBuilder

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<CrosstabBuilder, DRCrosstab>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.component.ComponentBuilder<CrosstabBuilder, DRCrosstab>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.component.DimensionComponentBuilder<CrosstabBuilder, DRCrosstab>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.crosstab.CrosstabBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CrosstabBuilder extends DimensionComponentBuilder<CrosstabBuilder, DRCrosstab>

CrosstabBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
